Tom, I was just making a list of all the things I have done in my life. It is longer than I thought!
That sounds fun! So, what is the most exciting thing you have ever done?
I think it was when I traveled abroad and explored the old city of Rome. It was the highlight of my year.
Amazing! Have you ever tried anything really thrilling, like diving?
Yes! I have gone diving once, and I felt so brave. But I have never been skydiving.
Me neither. What about helping others? Have you ever volunteered?
I have! Volunteering at a clinic was one of the most rewarding things I have ever done.
You have really accomplished a lot. Is there anything left on your bucket list?
Just one big thing: I have never seen snow. That is my dream of a lifetime.
The most rewarding thing I have ever done was to volunteer.
I have never seen snow, but it is on my bucket list.
Have you ever done anything really thrilling?
It was the trip of a lifetime.

People often ask me about the most exciting things I have done in my life, and honestly, I have been quite lucky. I have traveled abroad many times, and I have explored cities on almost every continent. The highlight of my life was probably climbing a mountain in Nepal; it was thrilling and a little scary, but I felt so brave at the top. I have also volunteered at an animal shelter, which was one of the most rewarding things I have ever done. There is still one big thing on my bucket list: I have never seen the northern lights, and I really want to. I believe every new experience, big or small, is an opportunity to grow. Life is short, so I try to say yes to adventure whenever I can.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah! I was just thinking about all the things I want to do in my life, and I had to call you. So far, I have accomplished a few of my dreams: I have lived abroad, and I have learned to scuba dive. But there is so much I have never tried! I have never been to Asia, and it has been my dream for years. Next summer, I am finally going to attempt something a little crazy: I want to go skydiving. I know it sounds scary, but I think it will be the most thrilling experience of my lifetime. Helping others is important to me too, so I have started to volunteer at a local library. Anyway, tell me: what is the bravest thing you have ever done? Call me back, I really want to know. Bye!

I have always loved trying new things in my life. A few years ago, I finally traveled abroad for the first time. There, I explored an old city, and it became the highlight of my trip. Later, I attempted something brave and went diving in the sea. Now, seeing the northern lights is the only thing left on my bucket list.
